name: Adjustable 7.6" Step Deck - All In Motion™: Polypropylene, 300lb Capacity, Total Body Workout
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Step exercise deck designed with a wide platform for different cardio-based workouts. Features a diamond grove pattern on the surface. Adjustable design with two levels allows you to adjust the height as needed for different workouts. Weight capacity of up to 300 pounds.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
